it:7.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:7.3:
"Monks, one who has not fully known and fully understood the All,
whose mind has not been cleansed of passion for it, has not abandoned it, is incapable of putting an end to suffering. But one who has fully known and fully understood the All, whose mind has been cleansed of passion for it, has abandoned it, is capable of putting an end to suffering."
it:7.4: Knowing the All from all around, not stirred by passion for anything at all: he, having comprehended the All, has gone beyond all suffering.
it:7.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
